name: filecub-office-agent-office
description: Agent Office - AI Pixel Agent workforce for FileCub Office

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/shared/db/migrations && cp src/shared/db/migrations/*.sql dist/shared/db/migrations/
scripts.build:web: npm --prefix apps/web-ui install && npm --prefix apps/web-ui run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:web
